title: Ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single CLI or Docker command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—install via npm and chat with local models in Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip-installable wrapper that exposes chat, generate, embed, pull, and list APIs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM backend for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama models; runs in Docker and supports multi-user, code highlighting, RAG uploads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive REPL for Ollama with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and customizable prompts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that hooks GitHub Copilot shortcuts to a local Ollama model for private code completions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with your PDFs entirely offline.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends selected code or buffer to an Ollama model and streams back explanations, tests, or refactors.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and model init containers.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for Llama-3, Phi-3, Starling, and other quantized GGUFs ready to import.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot UI that proxies OpenAI calls to Ollama, letting you use existing ChatGPT front-ends locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with builder-style API, Spring Boot starters, and reactive streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that wraps the Ollama REST API for C# developers, including IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: DBeaver VS Code extension that adds SQL query generation powered by a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio, providing generate/chat/embed endpoints and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that summons an Ollama model to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or rewrite text inside your vault.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example that horizontally scales Ollama containers across a GPU cluster for high-throughput serving.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot starter that autoconfigures an Ollama client bean and exposes actuator endpoints for health checks.
